description: Deterministic fixture-scoped demo showing packaged descriptor, mocked Steamworks wiring, no-Steam fallback, trusted local leaderboard payload, and Steam store asset proposals.
assertions: packaged artifact descriptor is deterministic and human-ring3-required
Steamworks features are wired through a mockable steamworks.js bridge over the existing runtime
no-Steam fallback preserves local play without network or a real Steam connection
store assets are proposal-only and generated through the Milestone 36 asset pipeline
boundary: Rust/local owns trusted validation; demo fixtures are deterministic and fixture-scoped; browser/Studio/Electron/Steamworks surfaces are read-only; no network, no live browser, no real Steam connection, no trusted write, no upload, no release authority; #1 and #23 remain open. This demo asserts behavior and gate states, not subjective fun or production readiness.
